lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: How do you feel? No heavy flu, shivers, nausea or loss of appetite?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... no... I feel fine...

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: How about nightmares then? Are you experiencing any problems with especially scary nightmares?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No... not since I was young.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: Good, good, I had to make sure. This plague really has an incredibly fast contagion rate. It spreads faster than the common cold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The plague? Tell me more.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: It came from the west somewhere. It is extremely quick spreading, and utterly deadly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the symptoms?

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: It varies slightly from case to case, but usually abnormal nightmares and flu-like symptoms, progressing as you succumb more. Eventually, it results in the presence of a thick black tar-like substance secreted

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: from the nose and eyes.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: Unfortunately if you reach this stage of infection then no one can save you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll be careful.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: You do that adventurer. You do not want to become infected by the plague.

sections.title: When speaking to Doctor Orbon while wearing a full set of mourner gear

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: Good day, you have my next payment? I don't keep this charade up for fun you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry I don't.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: Well if you would mention it next time you see the Head Mourner, it would be appreciated.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll keep it in mind.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: Hello there. Can't stop to talk I'm afraid, I'm very busy right now.
